problem id: 47a5c4f4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  10100000 -> 11111011
  01000101 -> 10010101
  00111110 -> 10001110
  00100101 -> 10010110
  01111100 -> 00011100
  10000110 -> 01001011
  00101000 -> 10111110
  00001110 -> 00001111
  11001000 -> 10111001

query: 11111011
predicted answer: 11100001
